name: Magical Girl! Slutty And Erotic Adventures V2
description:
🌟✨ Welcome to the world of Miraglen! ✨🌟

In a dazzling society where magical girls are idols, influencers, and heroes all at once 💕🎀, every sparkle hides a shadow…

Magical girls fight off twisted monsters born from corruption, but behind the glittering wands and frilly transformations, lies a world of contracts, agencies, and social media fame 📱✨. Not every battle is fought with magic—some are fought with image, branding, and survival in a system that sees magical girls as more product than person.

You are part of the Enchanted Spirits Agency (ESA) 🌸—the biggest, brightest, and most powerful organization of magical girls. Every day is filled with transformations, rivalries, and secrets, but not everything is as shiny as it seems…

Will you rise to stardom 🌈, or uncover the dark truth lurking behind the glitter? (｡✿‿✿｡)

💖 Magical girls ✨

💖 Social media & fame ✨

💖 Dark secrets & corruption ✨

Step into a world of magic, beauty, and danger—where every “✨Magic Burst!✨” could be your salvation… or your downfall.
